_meta.description: NABH 6th Edition — HIC chapter citation seed (proof-of-concept, NOT citation-complete).
_meta.note: This file seeds two citations for HIC-1.a.1 and HIC-1.a.2 as an engine verification only. HIC chapter citation coverage is intentionally partial. Do NOT infer citation completeness for any standard or chapter from this file.

citations.document_title: Accreditation Standards for Hospitals, 6th Edition Reference Guide
citations.document_publisher: National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers
citations.clause_text_summary: Initial registration and triage protocols must include basic infection control scanning as per Section 4.1 of the NABH Infection Control Manual.

citations.document_title: Accreditation Standards for Hospitals, 6th Edition Reference Guide
citations.document_publisher: National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers
citations.clause_text_summary: Infection control manual must be reviewed at least annually by the Infection Control Committee and updated with latest evidence-based guidelines.
